title: Roasted Smoky Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A light and smoky Brazilian dish featuring chicken skewers with a unique blend of flavors, including Branston pickle and dashi extract, perfect for a high protein meal.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped Branston pickle and dashi extract to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Cook the chicken to an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
